title: elaeocarpus sallehianus
intro: Elaeocarpus sallehianus, also known as the 'Malaysian Blue Bean Tree', is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of Elaeocarpus sallehianus are rich in antioxidants and have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
